tweetText: We just launched GPT-5.5, our most advanced model yet, designed for speed and handling complex tasks like coding and data analysis. This upgrade enhances productivity and innovation across various fields. via OpenAI News

OpenAI has released the system card for GPT-5.5, detailing its capabilities and guidelines for use. This transparency helps users understand the model better and promotes responsible AI deployment. via OpenAI News
Bret Taylor's AI startup Sierra has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment. This move strengthens Sierra's customer service capabilities and expands its market reach. via TechCrunch AI.

Noscroll has launched an AI bot designed to take over doomscrolling by reading the internet on your behalf. This could help users save time and reduce anxiety from endless news feeds. via TechCrunch AI
OpenAI has released GPT-5.5, enhancing its AI's capabilities significantly. This brings them closer to creating a powerful all-in-one AI tool. via TechCrunch AI

Era has raised $11M to create a software platform for various AI gadgets like glasses and rings. This funding highlights the growing interest in diverse AI hardware and its potential impact on daily life. via TechCrunch AI

Delve, a compliance company, is linked to a significant security incident at Context AI, an AI training startup. This highlights ongoing concerns about security in the rapidly evolving AI industry. via TechCrunch AI

Astronomers are using GPUs to sift through massive data to discover new celestial bodies. This surge in GPU demand is intensifying the existing global shortage of these crucial chips. via TechCrunch AI

Stanford students are flocking to a viral AI course, CS 153, to learn from top Silicon Valley experts. This trend highlights the growing demand for AI education and its impact on the tech industry. via WIRED AI.

Claude's AI can now connect directly to personal apps like Spotify and Uber Eats, expanding its capabilities. This matters because it enhances user experience by offering tailored suggestions for everyday activities. via The Verge AI
